name: Celanese Corp
sic_description: Plastic Material, Synth Resin/Rubber, Cellulos (No Glass)
summary: Basis of Presentation In this Annual Report on Form10-K, the term "Celanese" refers to Celanese Corporation, a Delaware corporation, and not its subsidiaries. The terms "Company," "we," "our" and "us" refer to Celanese and its subsidiaries on a consolidated basis. The term "Celanese U.S." refers to the Company's subsidiary, Celanese US Holdings LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and not its subsidiaries.
